subject: english
title: Unit 8 Grammar 1 — Describing people with who
subtitle: v5 · FC Leo United spine · 42 slides · people-only (no which/that) · DO not REVEAL · embodied academic mini-games (clause/contraction/trilobite) · LP-verbatim Practice + Recap · Champions League payoff

content: Give information about people using phrases with who.
Join two short sentences about a person into one using who.
Recognize that who comes right after the person being described — even in the middle of a sentence.
language: Use the pattern: PERSON + who + verb phrase.
Use who for both boys and girls — who never changes for gender.
Match verb agreement: ONE person + who + verb-s; MANY people + who + verb (no -s).
Recognize the contraction who's / she's as short forms of who is / she is.
